name: Junkfood Cookbook KFC
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken pieces and pat them dry with paper towels.
2. Mix flour with the dry Italian-style salad dressing mix and salt to taste in a bowl.
3. Dip each chicken piece into this flour mixture, letting it sit for a couple of minutes.
4. In another shallow bowl, beat the egg and club soda together.
5. Blend pancake mix with poultry seasoning, paprika, and pepper in a separate bowl.
6. Dip the flour-coated chicken pieces first in the egg mixture, then again in the pancake mixture.
7. Let the coated chicken pieces sit on a wire rack while heating the deep fat to 375 degrees Fahrenheit (190 degrees Celsius).
8. Cook the chicken pieces, turning them once, until they are a rich golden brown, about 20-25 minutes.
9. Drain the cooked chicken pieces on paper towels.
Yield: 4 servings
Variation: To prepare EXTRA CRISPY CHICKEN, dip the chicken (after it has been coated in the pancake mixture) back into the egg mixture and again into the pancake mixture before frying until done.
